ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crimes" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime */,
  "state_ut" TEXT /* State or union territory where the crime was committed */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the crime was committed */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the crime_types table */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location where the crime occurred */,
  "date" TEXT /* Exact date the crime was committed */,
  "time" TEXT /* Exact time the crime was committed */,
  "victim_count" INTEGER /* Number of victims involved in the crime */,
  "suspect_count" INTEGER /* Number of suspects involved in the crime */,
  "suspect_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of suspect IDs */,
  "investigating_agency" TEXT /* Agency responsible for the investigation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the crime */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the crime */,
  "evidence" TEXT /* Details of evidence collected */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the investigation */,
  "total_crimes" INTEGER /* Total number of crimes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the crime type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspects" (
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspect */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the suspect */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the suspect */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the suspect */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the suspect */,
  "arrested" INTEGER /* Whether the suspect has been arrested */,
  "criminal_history" TEXT /* Details of the suspect's criminal history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_suspects" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the crimes table */,
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the suspects table */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the suspect to the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id", "suspect_id")
)
column_names: State or union territory where the crime was committed
Foreign key to the crime_types table
Specific location where the crime occurred
Exact date the crime was committed
Exact time the crime was committed
Number of victims involved in the crime

Detailed description of the crime type
